title: Speed Happy Ghast
description: adds the speed effect to the happy ghast
body:
![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/VLqhYF3p/speed-happy-ghast.png)
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
In vanilla Minecraft, the ghast does not get faster even when affected by Speed. This datapack fixes that by allowing ghasts to truly increase their movement speed with the effect, making them more challenging and dynamic to fight.
